name: loen
description: Loop Engineering harness: run a controlled Plan-Act-Check-Report agent loop with an independent verifier, a machine-readable loop.yaml contract, and hard artifact-layout guardrails.

interface.shortDescription: Loop Engineering workflow assets for Codex
interface.longDescription: LoEn provides a controlled loop workflow with planning, action, checking, reporting, independent verification, and deterministic artifact guardrails.
